ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "num_train" INTEGER /* Number of training samples */,
  "num_test" INTEGER /* Number of testing samples */,
  "num_train_0" INTEGER /* Number of training samples with label 0 */,
  "num_train_1" INTEGER /* Number of training samples with label 1 */,
  "num_test_0" INTEGER /* Number of testing samples with label 0 */,
  "num_test_1" INTEGER /* Number of testing samples with label 1 */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., pooled, individual descriptors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the model */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the performance metrics record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model associated with these metrics */,
  "auroc" REAL /* Area under the ROC curve */,
  "aupr" REAL /* Area under the precision-recall curve */,
  "cutoff" REAL /* Cutoff threshold for classification */,
  "tp" INTEGER /* True positives */,
  "tn" INTEGER /* True negatives */,
  "fp" INTEGER /* False positives */,
  "fn" INTEGER /* False negatives */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the model */,
  "balanced_accuracy" REAL /* Balanced accuracy */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "mcc" REAL /* Matthews correlation coefficient */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for these metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metrics were last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the metrics */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the model version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was released */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who released the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Total number of samples in the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dataset */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the dataset usage record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model using the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset being used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_usage_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_usage_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter setting */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who set the hyperparameter */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being collaborated on */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead, co-researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was initiated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who initiated the collaboration */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given to the model */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who recorded the evaluation */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
